response.justification: Strong generalist with 15+ years of software craftsmanship, TDD discipline, and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Google. However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of production GenAI delivery: no mention of RAG implementations, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI. Cloud experience is present but light (AWS CDK at Meta), and the customer-facing technical-leadership dimension required for a Forward Deployed role is not demonstrated. Worth a screening call to probe the depth of recent GenAI/agentic work at Google.
strengths: 15+ years shipping production software with strong testing/craftsmanship discipline
Recent Google role touching MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Polyglot full-stack across TypeScript, Node.js, Python-adjacent ecosystems and cloud (AWS CDK)
concerns: No explicit production RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience listed
No demonstrated multi-agent framework work (LangGraph, CrewAI) or LLM optimization metrics
Limited evidence of customer-facing technical discovery or Forward Deployed/consulting delivery

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic tooling exposure at Google
